_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
clinical_indications: Diagnosis made is backed by clinical manifestation (Early signs: Belly button is noted to be wet; Later signs/symptoms: Fever, Lower abdominal pain, Fullness in the midline in the area below the belly button, Redness over the lower belly, Tiredness, Vomiting)

preauth.label: Clinical notes including evaluation findings, indication for procedure, and planned line of management

ppd_preauth.q: Was the Ultrasound abdomen/CT/MRI report shows presence of cyst in Urachus?

common_queries: Clinical notes and/or imaging (USG/MRI/CT scan) are not indicative of the presence of a cyst in Urachus.
Clinical notes including evaluation findings, indication for procedure, and planned line of management not submitted at pre-authorization.
USG abdomen/CT/MRI report not submitted at pre-authorization.
Detailed indoor case papers not submitted at claim submission.
Operative Notes / Procedure Notes not submitted at claim submission.
Histopathology report not submitted at claim submission.
Detailed Discharge Summary not submitted at claim submission.

clinical_key_pointers: Belly button is noted to be wet
Fullness in the midline in the area below the belly button
